title: Oairse Velvet Heart Shaped Box Set of 4 Gift Box with Lids for Flower Arrangements Red Heart Boxes Velvet Gift Boxes for Present, Valentine's Day, Wedding, Mother's Day, Thanksgiving, Christmas
features: 【Velvet Gift Boxes】: The nested gift boxes comes in 4 sets red boxes with various sizes to meet your demand. The small paper mache boxes with lids: 15cm(D)x 5.5cm(H); medium nesting gift boxes: 17.5cm(D)x 7cm(H);large gift boxes for presents: 19.5cm(D)x 8cm(H); extra large paper flower boxes: 22cm(D)x 9cm(H)(the flowers are not included)

【Heart-Shaped Design】:This red paper boxes set are designed heart shape, with charm lids, full of stylish and romantic accent, its design is elegant and delicate, which are perfect for packing your gifts to your loved one

【Eco-Friendly Flower Boxes】: These decorative boxes with lids are made of eco-friendly paper, and velvet which are made from well-managed forests, sturdy and environmentally friendly, which can be recycled. Since the smooth surface of the small gift boxes can be cleaned easily, you just need to wipe the surface gently with a dry cloth

【Perfect Decoration for Gift】: These floral heart boxes for flowers are ideal choice for gift giving, retail product presentation, giveaways, packaging items. You can put your gift into these love box as bridesmaids, proposals, Christmas gifts, birthday gifts, anniversary gifts, Thanksgiving gifts, wedding gifts, graduation gifts, business gifts, Wedding gifts, Baby Showers gift, etc

【Pracical Nesting Gift Boxes】: The velvet heart shaped boxes can be widely applied at home or store, which can be packing mini bouquets,candles, watches, jewelry, small clothing accessories, gift cards, homemade crafts. You can fill some colorful shredded crinkle paple into your red gift box and tie with ribbons or twine to DIY your unique gift box
description: 4 Packs Velvet Gift Boxes with Lids - Make a Gift for Your Loved One Velvet Heart Shaped Gift Boxes Set of 4 bring a luxurious and romantic way to present your special gifts. Each box is covered in soft red velvet fabric, giving it a premium look and feel while ensuring durability. The set includes four sizes, perfect for holding jewelry, candles, keepsakes, or other delicate items. These reusable heart boxes are designed not only as practical storage but also as an elegant part of the gift itself. Whether you are preparing for Valentine’s Day, a wedding, an anniversary, or a birthday celebration, these heart-shaped boxes add a meaningful touch to every occasion. Perfect for gift wrapping, romantic surprises, bridesmaid proposals, and decorative storage, these velvet boxes will make every present stand out. Share love and elegance with this beautiful set of heart-shaped gift boxes. Specifications: Material: Velvet + sturdy cardboard Color: Red/White/Pink/Black Quantity: Set of 4 (S/M/L/XL sizes) Size: Small (S): 6" x 2.2" (15cm x 5.5cm) Medium (M): 6.9" x 2.8" (17.5cm x 7cm) Large (L): 7.7" x 3.1" (19.5cm x 8cm) Extra Large (XL): 8.7" x 3.5" (22cm x 9cm) Note: Please allow slight size variations due to manual measurement. Actual color may vary slightly due to lighting conditions.
